items.name_en: BV New Arrival! The Andiamo combines archival Parachute bag elements with modern trends. A classic design featuring a handle, shoulder, and crossbody straps. Adorned with metal brass knot closures. Compact yet surprisingly spacious, easily fitting daily essentials like sunglasses, a small water bottle, compact powder, and a charger. Goes perfectly with any outfit.

items.name_en: BV New Mini Bag Top Tier Bottega Veneta New Concert Pouch. Small capacity, big potential. Fits a Pro Max phone. Adjustable strap for crossbody or shoulder wear. Super high cost-performance. The latest small bag for autumn and winter has a huge capacity. Tested to fit 4 short wallets, and even fits my fist. Cute and adorable with a capacity that is impressive. The strap length is adjustable, scoring full marks for daily commuting.

items.name_en: BV patti bag Full and three-dimensional padded leather strip, understated luxury is often hidden in details and craftsmanship. This bag has a casual opening, simple and elegant overall design, and comes with a detachable shoulder strap for crossbody or handheld wear to match different outfits. The interior features double-layering and a zippered pocket for secure storage of private items. Whether for capacity, style, or privacy, it offers a full sense of security.

items.name_en: BV Pinacoteca Double-sided Tote
items.name_cn:
BV Pinacoteca Double-sided Tote
This new BV double-sided tote really hits the spot! It's amazing~ Super suitable for the festive atmosphere✨, looks good and brings luck~
10mm weaving craftsmanship paired with Silky Calf texture is full! The handle design is unique, four drawstrings for styling, and can be closed, stylish and practical~
👜Double-sided, switch between woven and suede sides, practical and versatile~
🐕Adding the limited edition New Year puppy charm adds a touch of liveliness, super matching.
Style:817166
Size:43*23*17.5

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: BV really understands consumers, making this bestseller irresistible. A must-have for going out (Large). Andiamo. Friends who surf the internet often notice that Guo Caijie, Ning Zetao, Mika, Tong Liliya, Yu Feihong, and Du Juan have all carried this bag. As one of the 2023 bestsellers, it debuted in the Matthieu Blazy 2023 Summer Collection. Crafted with exquisite leatherwork, it meets the dressing needs of all people and occasions. Available in three sizes, it emphasizes practicality and versatility. Elegant, versatile, and not limited by age or gender. Low-key, simple, durable, and really loveable.
